attributes.description: Overview of CrowdStrike Falcon SIEM events.

params.markdown:
## Falcon overview

This dashboard is the primary overview for CrowdStrike Falcon SIEM activity from the `crowdstrike.falcon` data stream. Use it to monitor events collected through the Falcon Event Streams API or SIEM connector, including severity trends, MITRE ATT&CK coverage, and affected hosts and users.

Summary charts show detections by ECS category, events by severity, and breakdowns by MITRE tactic and technique name. A time series shows activity over time by event type so you can spot surges in specific Falcon event categories. Top related hosts and users highlight where Falcon activity is concentrated. The newest detections panel lists recent Falcon detections for investigation.

Filter by **Hostname**, **Event Type**, **Severity**, **MITRE Tactic Name**, and **MITRE Technique Name** to narrow the view. Use the navigation links to open the package **Overview**, **FDR**, **Alert**, **Host**, **Vulnerability**, or Identity Protection dashboards.

embeddableConfig.title: Events over Time by Event Type
